understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate the player character to the goal gem tile ('+') by moving horizontally and using gravity to fall onto safe surfaces or passages, while avoiding spike hazards.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is restricted to MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT. After each horizontal move, gravity pulls the character down (or up) until they land on a solid tile or hit a hazard. CLICK can remove breakable blocks ('x') to open paths. UNDO reverses the last action. Spikes ('u'/'v') cause immediate loss. The level has turn and attempt limits, and previews show landing positions.
